name: AI Addendum
description: Standard AI Addendum covering the use of AI services as part of a product, including restrictions, input/output ownership, and AI-specific warranties.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA compliance, governing the use and disclosure of Protected Health Information (PHI).

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) covering SaaS access, support, data protection, security, warranties, and liability for cloud services.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) governing the processing of personal data, processor/subprocessor relationships, and data protection compliance.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard Design Partner Agreement for early product access programs, covering feedback, product development, and partner obligations.

name: Mutual NDA
description: Standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA) standard terms for protecting confidential information shared between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement, containing party details and customizable fields.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard Partnership Agreement covering mutual obligations, cooperation, feedback, intellectual property, and revenue sharing between partners.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard Pilot Agreement for trial or evaluation access to a product, covering pilot period terms, restrictions, and transition to paid use.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) covering consulting and professional services engagements, statements of work, and deliverables.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard Service Level Agreement (SLA) covering uptime targets, downtime calculations, service credits, and support response times.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard Software License Agreement covering on-premises or installed software licensing, user accounts, updates, and usage restrictions.
